channel.title: briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL
channel.description: This is a randomly ordered feed of the most recent entries from briefUpdatesBreakingOffshootNL, skipping any feeds with errors.

item.title: Hezbollah strikes Israel as American and Israeli planes pound Iran
item.description: Iran and Iranian-backed militias fired missiles at Israel and Arab states, apparently hitting the U.S. Embassy compound in Kuwait, while Israel and th...

item.title: Iran war widens, threatens to engulf Lebanon
item.description: The war over Iran engulfed more of the Middle East and beyond on Monday as Lebanon's militant group Hezbollah responded to the killing of Iran's spiri...

item.title: The War Expands
item.description: We have the latest news from multiple fronts in the Middle East.

item.title: Ivermectin is making a post-pandemic comeback, among cancer patients
item.description: The anti-parasitic drug became a household name during the COVID-19 pandemic, and it is now being embraced as an alternative treatment for cancer. It ...

item.title: How to Think About Trump’s War With Iran
item.description: Ending the Islamic Republic’s regime will be long and arduous, but perhaps a softer version will emerge.

item.title: New York City Paid $117 Million to Settle Misconduct Lawsuits in 2025
item.description: The largest settlements, more than $24 million combined, went to two men wrongfully convicted of killing a French tourist in Midtown in 1987, an analy...

item.title: As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines
item.description: Disregarded by President Trump over Iran, Europe’s leaders are adapting to a world in which they are little more than bystanders.

item.title: Trump Says More U.S. Casualties Are ‘Likely’ in War With Iran, and Oil Prices Jump After Attack
item.description: Plus, what to know about the A.I. videos that kids are watching.

item.title: How long do electric vehicle batteries actually last?
item.description: When the modern electric vehicle was still in its infancy, drivers worried that vehicles would need expensive battery replacements within a few years....

item.title: Peer pressure can make this clownfish change its stripes
item.description: Tomato clownfish, in response to an unpredictable world, appear capable of adjusting when they lose their stripes based on cues from other fish and th...

item.title: Live Updates: Mideast Conflict Widens Across Multiple Fronts
item.description: Iran and allied militias, including Hezbollah, attacked Israel and U.S. targets in the Gulf in retaliation for Ayatollah Khamenei’s death. Israel stru...

item.title: After Attack on Iran by the U.S. and Israel, See Photos and Videos From the Middle East
item.description: Here are images from Iran, Israel, Lebanon and elsewhere in the Middle East.

item.title: As Trump Bombs Iran, America’s Allies Watch Fitfully From Sidelines
item.description: Disregarded by President Trump over Iran, Europe’s leaders are adapting to a world in which they are little more than bystanders.

item.title: 3 U.S. Planes Are Shot Down in ‘Friendly Fire’ in Kuwait, U.S. Military Says
item.description: Separately, a drone attack hit the U.S. Embassy compound in the Persian Gulf state, as Iran continues to target American assets across the Middle East...
